headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 24, 2026**
article:
The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, helping the Reds secure the win. In other action, the Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Eugenio Suárez, who was placed on the 10-day injured list by the Cincinnati Reds due to a mild left oblique strain. The Toronto Blue Jays also placed Nathan Lukes on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred Yimi García from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list for right elbow ulnar nerve and AC joint surgery.

The Toronto Blue Jays made a trade, acquiring catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Chicago Cubs also made a trade, acquiring third baseman Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Tigers in Thrilling 9-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, helping the Reds secure the win.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Fall to Orioles in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox suffered a 10-3 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, with Adley Rutschman leading the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs. Brandon Young earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 5.2 innings with 5 strikeouts and 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the offense with 2 home runs and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Edge Mets in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-3 victory over the New York Mets, with Michael Lorenzen earning the win.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles in a lopsided 17-1 victory. Garrett Crochet led the Red Sox pitching staff, while multiple players contributed to the team's high-scoring offense.

top_news.title: **Rockies Shut Out by Mets in Thrilling Matchup**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 0-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, marking a hard-fought win for the Mets. Ryan Feltner started for the Rockies, but the team's offense was unable to capitalize on opportunities.

top_news.title: **Reds Place Eugenio Suárez on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Cincinnati Reds third baseman Eugenio Suárez has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a mild left oblique strain, retroactive to April 23, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash.
